constraints.expression: seq strictly increases by 1 per span_index, starting at 0
constraints.message: SpanMove.seq MUST be strictly monotonic per span (no gaps, no repeats); a gap or repeat is a chain violation.
constraints.evaluation_note: Cross-record (per-span) check; the library walks the span log in order.

constraints.expression: prev_hash equals the prior move's record_hash; the first move of a span uses the genesis anchor sha256:000...000
constraints.message: SpanMove.prev_hash MUST chain to the prior move's record_hash; flipping any byte of history changes the head (LG-2).

constraints.expression: record_hash equals sha256(RFC8785_canonical_json(record with the record_hash key absent))
constraints.message: SpanMove.record_hash MUST be the sha256 of the canonical record with the record_hash key OMITTED before canonicalization (not empty, not null).
constraints.evaluation_note: Single-record derivation; the canonicalizer omits the record_hash key.

constraints.expression: env_fingerprint is present if and only if determinism == 're_executable'
constraints.message: A re_executable move MUST carry env_fingerprint (LG-4b); an attestable move MUST NOT.

constraints.expression: RFC8785 canonical-json byte length of the record <= 4096
constraints.message: SpanMove canonical form MUST NOT exceed 4096 bytes; the recorder refuses loudly (LEGBA_MOVE_TOO_LARGE) at record time, never truncates.
